The '''Skirmish over Vuchelle''' was a battle of the late [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In it, a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-led [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] task force dealt a severe blow to the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]].

==Background==
The Pirates of Iridium were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] group allied with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and had been harassing the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] for a year. Despite that, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Belsed-Qan Idan]] attempted to negotiate, but the pirates opened fire on the Republic force.

==The skirmish==
The pirates attacked with three [[2 Warpod|Warpod Pinnaces]] armed with [[Power gem]] weapons, two [[Longprow attack cruiser]]s and five [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], facing the armed [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Monitor III]]'' and six [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 interceptors]] on the Republic side.

The Pinnaces used their power gems to strip the task force ships of their shields, and caused damage to the Republic cruiser ''[[Monitor III]]''. The ship was saved by speedy counterattacks made by the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi interceptors]], who proceeded to disable the warpods and move in on the Longprow attack cruisers, disabling their shields and targeting their drive systems. One cruiser was taken intact, the other blew up after a reactor overload. At least 12 [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] were seen to leave the craft prior to its destruction.

Out of five [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] starfighters used by the pirates, four were destroyed, while the fifth was believed to have succumbed to [[Vuchelle]]'s gravity well and burned up on reentry. All observed escape pods were retrieved by ''Monitor III''.
